# External Repositories

This folder is used for local copies of external repositories.

Expected local repositories:

- ASCAD: https://github.com/ANSSI-FR/ASCAD
- TS2Vec: https://github.com/zhihanyue/ts2vec

These external repositories are not tracked by Git. Clone them locally when needed:

```bash
cd external
git clone https://github.com/ANSSI-FR/ASCAD.git
git clone https://github.com/zhihanyue/ts2vec.git
